title: WoKPack DH
description: Distant Horizons variant of the World of Keralis modpack
body:
# WoKPack DH

**WoKPack DH** is the Distant horizons variant of WOKPack. Maintaining the same performance and quality of life features from the mainline WOKPack, but with vastly extended render distance.

## Focus Areas and Key Dependencies

### 1. Performance optimizations:
- **Sodium**: (including Reeses Sodium Options): A powerful rendering engine for better FPS.
- **Lithium**: Optimizes game logic for smoother gameplay.
- **FerriteCore**: Reduces memory usage to improve stability.
- **Krypton**: Enhances networking performance and reduces latency.
- **EntityCulling**: Reduces rendering load by skipping unseen entities.
- **ImmediatelyFast**: Optimizes block rendering.
- **ModernFix**: Addresses common compatibility and optimization issues.
- **Noisium**: Provides sound feedback for in-game events.
- **Dynamic FPS: Enables framerate cap when game window is not selected
- **Better Biome Reblend**: Replaces vanilla's biome blend algorithm with a more efficient one
- **ScalableLux**: Rewrites lighting engine to be more efficient

### 2. Additional Optifine parody features:
- **Iris**: Adds shader support for a visually stunning experience.
- **Polytone**: Enhances the overall aesthetic of your builds.
- **Continuity**: Adds seamless connected textures for a polished look.
- **Capes**: Adds customization options for player visuals.
- **JustZoom**: Offers enhanced zoom functionality.
- **Entity Model Features**: Adds Optifinelike entity model features
- **Entity Texture Features**: Adds Optifinelike entity texture features
- **LambDynamicLights**: Adds Optifinelike dynamic lights

### 3. Quality of life features:
- **WorldEdit**: Provides powerful tools for building and editing large structures.
- **Axiom**: Turns minecraft into 3d modeling software
- **Itemswapper**: Speeds up inventory management by swapping tools automatically.
- **Jade**: Displays helpful block and entity information.
- **Cubes Without borders**: add windowed borderless as a display option
- **Resourcify**: allows you to install and update resourcepacks (including wokflows) and shaderpacks from in game
- **3D-Skin-Layers**: Displays avatar skins layers as 3d
- **BetterF3**: Cleans up the f3 menu and makes it more readable
- **Bigshot**: Allows for higher resolution screenshots
- **Language Reload**: Allows for languages to load faster
- **Model Gap Fix**: Fixes gaps in models
- **More Chat History**: Allows you to scroll further up in chat
- **Remove Loading Screen**: Removes the loading screen, allowing you to get back into game faster
- **No Telemetry**: Removes telemetry
- **Smooth Skies**: removes line in the skybox

### 4. Distant Horizons:
- **Distant Horizons**: Increases render distance using LODs
- **Xaero's minimap**: Adds minimap
- **Xaero's worldmap**: Adds Dynmaplike worldmap
- **XaeroPlus**: Adds additional Xaero's mod features
---

**WoKPack** combines cutting-edge performance enhancements with immersive features and user-friendly improvements to provide a seamless Minecraft experience. This pack is designed to keep your game running smoothly while offering tools to expand your creativity whilst building and exploring around the World of Keralis Creative server and beyond.
